patch.value: Generate pm_run action-list description from PM_TOOL_ACTIONS to end prose/enum drift
server.ts hand-writes the pm_run action list in prose; new actions (schema, history-repair, history-redact) require manual edits or agents get no discoverability hint.
Action description computed from PM_TOOL_ACTIONS (plus dynamic package section); test asserts it includes schema+history-repair; adding an action auto-appears.
